message:
Add Homebrew installation instructions (#237)

* Add Homebrew installation instructions

Add a Homebrew tab to the Packages section of the installation guide,
documenting how to install Tenzir on macOS via brew cask.

* Fix PR preview deploy workflow

     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

     steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
       - name: Download PR artifact
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:

@@ -50,6 +50,24 @@ starts the node automatically.
 ## Packages
 
 <Tabs>
+<TabItem value="homebrew" label="Homebrew" icon="apple">
+
+Install Tenzir on macOS (Apple Silicon) via [Homebrew](https://brew.sh):
+
+```sh
+brew install --cask tenzir/tenzir/tenzir
+```
+
+Or tap the repository first if you prefer:
+
+```sh
+brew tap tenzir/tenzir
+brew install --cask tenzir
+```
+
+To uninstall, run `brew uninstall --cask tenzir`.
+
+</TabItem>
 <TabItem value="debian" label="Debian" icon="linux">
 
 <Steps>
